prestazioni: 3UR-FE 5.7L V8 engine: Full forged internals by Manley (forged pistons, H-beam connecting rods, and crankshaft) with a 12.0:1 compression ratio, paired with a Magnuson TVS2300 Supercharger (12 psi boost) and a custom intercooler core by CSF Racing (8-row, 4.5" thick) for sustained power delivery up to 650whp on E85 fuel.

Dual Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pumps with a Radium Engineering surge tank and ID1000x injectors, controlled via a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel sensor integration for seamless E85 blending and real-time AFR monitoring via AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors.

TRD Pro-specific suspension overhaul: King Shocks 2.5" Remote Reservoir Coilovers (8" travel front, 10" rear) with custom valving for desert racing, paired with Hellwig 2.5" Big Wig sway bars and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings for chassis rigidity, complemented by a Torsen limited-slip differential with 4.88:1 gearing from Nitro Gear & Axle.
estetica: RTR Vehicles Tundra TRD Pro-specific widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, rocker panels, and rear quarter panels) with a 3" extended wheelbase conversion, finished in BASF RM Diamond White paint with a custom matte black wrap on the hood and roof for heat management.

Vortex V3 front bumper with integrated Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (50" light bar) and a custom fabricated rear bumper by Fab Fours (with integrated dual exhaust exits for a custom 3" stainless steel Borla Atak cat-back system), paired with a RCI Aluminum full skid plate package.

Method MR701 wheels (17x9 +18 front, 17x10 +25 rear) wrapped in 37x12.50R17 Nitto Ridge Grappler tires, mounted on ICON Vehicle Dynamics 1.5" wheel spacers for aggressive stance, with custom TRD Pro heritage graphics (matte red and black) and a carbon fiber bed cap by ARE Accessories.
